title: Luffy Refuses to Mock Bellamy
description: Pages 9–13 focus on luffy refuses to mock bellamy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as bellamy refuses to abandon his pride even after Doflamingo uses him, leaving Luffy trapped between mercy and battle.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Corazon was trying to save...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This very country itself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you hadn't completely screwed the pooch that day, this coun- try might have been spared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The rain of tragedy that has blanketed it all this time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you, yourself, really think so?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: FuffUfufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're still level-headed, eh? A shrewd point. You are correct!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll say it myself: Regardless of what that document may have revealed, I'd have just changed my plans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And taken this throne anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The mission Corazon risked his life to complete...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: was, in the end, all for Naught!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not if I have any say in the matter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Everything I do on this planet, until my death...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All of it... Will just be seen through the deeds left to me by Cora- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see...almost makes me want to shed a tear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But that's just it! For every trag- edy, every error!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The reality is simply that they have already occurred! There's no changing that fact!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The fact that you ate the ope ope no mi and ran off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And the fact that you began to bare your fangs at me on punk hazard! Even the fact that you're here right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: GuAah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Behe~! He fucking did it! Behehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: JIGSAW! It's the JIGSAW!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: UWAAAA AAAAA GGGGGH HHH!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fuffufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I guess you were being influenced by another "D." Well, the fact that you came here, too, is an already- immutable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Fact!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: And so, I shall forgive you!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Just as I forgive my father and brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: with the embrace of death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Fuck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: To finish you off, there really isn't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: A more fitting bullet than a lead one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Jet GATLLING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Something's come flying up from below!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: It's Shadow Duffy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Mingo! Show your friggin' face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Beeee! Hehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Shadow Duffy's in Tatters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I guess my cage was a little too cramped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: To keep something like that cooped up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The following performance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bellamy! Quit it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: UUGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

summary: Luffy Refuses to Mock Bellamy advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
